title: The Well at the World's End
author: William Morris
description: The Well at the World's End by William Morris is a classic fantasy novel published in 1896. It follows the journey of Ralph of Upmeads, a young knight who leaves his peaceful home in search of adventure and a legendary magical well said to grant strength and long life to those who drink from it. Along the way, Ralph encounters mystical lands, treacherous enemies, and wise allies-including a mysterious woman named Ursula. The story is rich in medieval imagery and themes of chivalry, destiny, and
